title: Claim-Bounded Diagnostics for Dark-Component-like SPARC Rotation-Curve Residuals: Residual-Regime Mapping, Comparator Audits, and Null-Control Checks
description: Claim-bounded diagnostic audit repository for dark-component-like residual structure in SPARC galaxy rotation-curve data. This repository archive is a residual-regime mapping and null-control package, not a claim of dark-matter exclusion, Lambda-CDM replacement, MOND/RAR falsification, NFW-halo falsification, Bullet-Cluster explanation, particle identity, Hubble-tension solution, or SN-RRF as a physical dark-matter substitute.
